summary: SLA113 Iteration 15 testing complete. All NEW features working: Universe Registry (4 core universes auto-registered with color-coded engines), Real Compliance Engine (pulls actual RTP 96.49% from Logic Engine, shows WARN for missing RNG/paytable), WebSocket Frontline (real-time metrics with LINKED status), Frontline Snapshot API (returns all metrics including universes_online), SLA113 removed from Empire 1 nav. Backend: 21/21 tests pass. Frontend: All features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Universe Registry uses in-memory _universe_registry dict - auto-registers 4 core universes on module load
Real Compliance Engine pulls RTP from project.logic_specs where logic_type='rtp' - shows actual calculated_rtp or target_rtp
Compliance status: CERTIFIED (no fails/warns), CONDITIONAL (has warns), NEEDS_REMEDIATION (has fails)
WebSocket Frontline pushes metrics every 2 seconds including universes_online count
Frontline Snapshot API returns same metrics as WebSocket for non-WS clients
Empire 1 AppHeader.jsx has no SLA113 link - only Engines, Composer, Analytics, History
Universe cards show color-coded engines: cyan=fastapi+mongodb, indigo=emergent-llm, amber=vertex-ai, zinc=internal
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed universes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA113 now has Universe Registry (4 core universes: sla113, empire1, southern, soulfire), Real Compliance Engine that pulls RTP from Logic Engine (project 219b65d6-aa30-4799-b6df-d2d9e2ba3a98 has RTP 96.49%), WebSocket Frontline at /api/sla113/frontline/ws, and Frontline Snapshot at /api/sla113/frontline/snapshot. Empire 1 nav no longer has SLA113 link. Compliance statuses: CERTIFIED, CONDITIONAL, NEEDS_REMEDIATION.

backend_api.notes: Returns real RTP from Logic Engine, WARN for missing data
WebSocket connects and pushes frontline_update every 2s

frontend_ui.notes: Loads with splash screen, all partitions accessible
WebSocket-connected, shows LINKED status, real-time metrics
Shows 4 universe cards with color-coded engines
Shows RTP info bar (96.49%), WARN/PASS status colors
No SLA113 link - only Engines, Composer, Analytics, History

mocked_apis_list: Audio Forge (visual-only, no real audio generation)
Build Pipeline compilation (stages advance with random progress 30-60%)
Deploy Engine (generates mock CDN URLs, not real deployments)
